description_long: This is a commercial-style pizza oven with a robust, boxy metal exterior and a glass front door that allows visibility of the interior. The oven features a control panel at the top front, equipped with toggle switches, a temperature gauge, and indicator lights. Inside, there are two rotating racks, each holding a pizza, with a visible spiral heating element above. The sides and back are solid metal, while the front and part of the sides have a transparent window for monitoring the food. The branding 'THE WELL STACKED PIZZA CO.' with a pizza slice logo is prominently displayed on the upper front and sides. The base of the oven has a vented grille, likely for cooling or air intake.
description: A commercial pizza oven with a glass front door, metal body, control panel, and visible branding. It features two internal racks with pizzas and a prominent vented base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, glass door, interior racks with pizzas, and the vented base.
description_view_1: Angled side view with the door open, revealing the interior racks and the 'THE WELL STACKED PIZZA CO.' branding on the side.
description_view_2: Direct rear-side view highlighting the full branding and both pizzas inside, with the door closed.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the door open, showing the interior racks and side branding.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located at the top front of the oven and features two toggle switches on the left, a central analog temperature gauge, a red indicator light, and a round button or knob on the right. The panel is labeled with white text and has a simple, utilitarian layout.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a vertical, integrated bar running along the right edge of the glass door, made of metal with a matte finish and no visible decorative features.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large rectangular glass window occupies most of the front door, allowing clear visibility of the oven's interior.
attribute_brand_logo: THE WELL STACKED PIZZA CO. logo is visible on the upper front and both side panels, featuring a pizza slice graphic above the text in a clean, modern font.
attribute_ventilation_features: A vented grille is present at the base of the oven's front, likely for air intake or cooling.
